description: Full-featured data grid with declarative column definitions, client-side and server-side data modes, sorting, inline column filters, global search, row selection with bulk actions, column visibility picker, drag-to-group with multi-level grouping, pagination with per-group mini-pager for server-side grouping, virtualized scrolling, external filter builder, and saved view management.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: In-memory items. When set without DataProvider, client-side sort/filter/pagination applies.

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Server-side data provider. When set, overrides Items and calls GetDataAsync on query changes.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows a loading spinner instead of rows. Useful for manual loading control.

parameters.name: EmptyTitle
parameters.description: Heading shown in the empty state when no items are available.

parameters.name: Selectable
parameters.description: Enables row checkboxes for multi-select.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: When true, shows the global search input. Default: true.

parameters.name: ShowColumnPicker
parameters.description: When true, shows the column visibility picker. Default: true.

parameters.name: ShowPagination
parameters.description: When true, shows the TmPagination bar when more than one page exists. Default: true.

parameters.name: DefaultPageSize
parameters.description: Initial page size. Default: 25.

parameters.name: PageSizeOptions
parameters.description: Page size options shown in the pagination dropdown.

parameters.name: ViewProvider
parameters.description: Optional view persistence provider. When set, shows TmViewManager.

parameters.name: ViewFilterDefinitions
parameters.description: Filter definitions for the view manager filter builder.

parameters.name: ShowExternalFilterBuilder
parameters.description: When true, shows FilterBuilder for external filtering (visible when ViewProvider is set).

parameters.name: ExternalFilterDefinitions
parameters.description: Filter definitions for the external filter builder (shown above table when ViewProvider is set).

parameters.name: DisplayResolver
parameters.description: Universal display resolver for field labels and enum filter values. DisplayResolver(fieldName, null) returns localized field label; DisplayResolver(fieldName, rawValue) returns localized value (e.g. enum). Return null to use defaults. Set once — flows to ViewManager, FilterBuilder, and filter chips.

parameters.name: ViewCanCreateTenantViews
parameters.description: Whether the user can create tenant-wide views. Default: false.

parameters.name: CurrentUserId
parameters.description: Current user ID for personal view scoping.

parameters.name: CurrentTenantId
parameters.description: Current tenant ID for tenant view scoping.

parameters.name: ScrollMode
parameters.description: Scroll/pagination mode. Default: Pagination.

parameters.name: VirtualItemSize
parameters.description: Height of a single row in pixels (required for Virtualize). Default: 48.

parameters.name: VirtualOverscanCount
parameters.description: Number of extra items to render above/below viewport. Default: 3.

parameters.name: VirtualScrollHeight
parameters.description: Fixed height for the virtualized scroll container (e.g. "600px", "80vh").

parameters.name: ShowGrouping
parameters.description: Whether to show the grouping drop zone above the table.

parameters.name: GroupsCollapsedByDefault
parameters.description: Whether groups are collapsed by default.

parameters.name: OnRowClick
parameters.description: Fires when a data row is clicked.

parameters.name: OnSelectionChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the selection changes.

parameters.name: OnGroupingChanged
parameters.description: Fires when grouping configuration changes.

parameters.name: SelectionActions
parameters.description: Render fragment shown in the selection action bar (bulk actions).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class applied to the wrapper div.

examples.title: Basic data table with columns
examples.code:
<TmDataTable TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" ViewContext="employees">
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Name" Field="e => e.Name" Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Department" Field="e => e.Department" Sortable="true" Groupable="true" />
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Salary" Field="e => e.Salary" Sortable="true" Align="ColumnAlign.Right" Width="120px" />
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Actions" Hideable="false">
        <CellTemplate Context="emp">
            <button @onclick="() => Edit(emp)">Edit</button>
        </CellTemplate>
    </TmDataTableColumn>
</TmDataTable>

examples.title: Server-side data table with selection and views
examples.code:
<TmDataTable TItem="OrderDto"
             DataProvider="@orderProvider"
             ViewContext="orders"
             ViewProvider="@viewProvider"
             Selectable="true"
             ShowGrouping="true"
             OnRowClick="HandleRowClick"
             OnSelectionChanged="HandleSelectionChanged">
    <SelectionActions>
        <TmButton OnClick="DeleteSelected">Delete</TmButton>
    </SelectionActions>
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Order #" Field="o => o.OrderNumber" Sortable="true" />
    <TmDataTableColumn Title="Status" Field="o => o.Status" Filterable="true" FilterType="FilterType.Select" FilterOptions="@statusOptions" />
</TmDataTable>

examples.title: Full-featured table with server-side DataProvider, ViewManager, external filters, and DisplayResolver

Implementing IDataTableDataProvider with server-side grouping and per-group pagination
